ras-el-hanout-moroccan-spice-mix-pequere.name: Ras El Hanout (moroccan Spice Mix)
ras-el-hanout-moroccan-spice-mix-pequere.original_name: Ras el Hanout casero (mezcla de especias marroquí)

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons of cardamom seeds (you can buy here)
2 teaspoons of mics (you can buy here)
1 teaspoon of ground cinnamon (you can buy here)
1 tablespoon of ground nut (you can buy here)
1 / 2 tablespoons of anises in grain (you can buy here)
1 / 2 teaspoon of white pepper in grain (you can buy here)
2 teaspoons ginger powder (you can buy here)
1 tablespoon of turmeric (you can buy here)
1 tablespoon of cumin seeds (you can buy here)
1 teaspoon of cilantro seeds (you can buy here)
1 / 2 teaspoon ground black pepper (you can buy here)
3 or 4 cloves of smell (you can buy here)
1 / 2 teaspoon ham pepper (you can buy here)

instructions: In a frying pan, we put all the spices into grain. We heat up with medium heat, often stirring, for 1-2 minutes, till the spices start releasing their fragrance.
We pass all the roasted spices with all the powder spices to an electrical mill and we ground them to a fine and homogenous powder. We have an airtight container.

raspberry-curd.name: Raspberry Curd
instructions: Combine raspberries and sugar in a high-powered blender (such as Vitamix®).

Carefully crack eggs into a small glass bowl, making sure no pieces of shell fall into the bowl. Pour eggs into the blender with the raspberry mixture. Cover and blend on low Variable 1, quickly adjusting to Variable 10. Blend on high speed for 1 minute.
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Pour in raspberry mixture through a sieve. Add lemon juice. Cook and stir until curd thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon, about 5 minutes.

raspberry-lemon-ice-cream.name: Raspberry Lemon Ice Cream
instructions: Whisk cream, milk, sugar, and salt together in a large bowl until well combined.

Combine raspberry preserves, fresh raspberries, and lemon zest in a small bowl, breaking up preserves; add to cream mixture, whisking until nicely blended and no clumps remain. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.

Pour mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions until soft ice cream consistency, 25 to 30 minutes. Enjoy immediately, or transfer to an airtight container and freeze until firm, about 4 hours.

raspberry-snakebite.name: Raspberry Snakebite
instructions: Add crème de cassis to a pint glass filled with ice. Top off with beer. Garnish with mint.

recipe-for-cheese-balls-in-airfryer-come.name: Recipe For Cheese Balls In Airfryer
recipe-for-cheese-balls-in-airfryer-come.original_name: Receta de bolitas de queso en airfryer
instructions: Take mozzarella and cut into middlepieces or small cubes.
Bate el huevo hasta que quede espumoso.
Esparce el pan molido y condimenta con la sal, pimienta al gusto. El ajo en polvo y el perejil.
Agrega la harina de trigo en un plato hondo.
It purifies the air frying at 200 been 3 been.
Fits mozzarella cubes through wheat flour till they get impregnated, then through the beaten egg and finally through the frosted bread with spices.
Put the balls in the bowl of the air fryer, spray with some oil in spray.
Hornea por 10 minutos hasta que se doren y queden un poco crujientes.
Retire from the air fryer, let rest and taste with some dip.
Enjoy!

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-spicy-tomat.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs In Spicy Tomato Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-spicy-tomat.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo en salsa de tomate picante

ingredients.item: 500 gr de tomates pelados y sin semillas

instructions: Retira la piel de los muslos de pollo. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Warm a frying pan or grill with some olive oil and dorate chicken thighs for 7 minutes from each side.
Meanwhile, his teeth are garlic and his onion. Filet both and cut the pepper into small pieces.
Warm another frying pan with olive oil and sock onion with garlic and pepper for 3 minutes.
Clean the guindels and cut into very small pieces. Jumped for a few more minutes.
Vierte el vino blanco, y cocina hasta que se reduzca un poco.
Cut the peeled tomatoes into pieces and add to the frying pan with the tomato paste. Season with salt and pepper and mix very well. Let's cook for about 5 minutes on medium heat.
Incorpora los muslos a la salsa. Deja cocinar por unos 7 minutos a fuego medio o hasta que los muslos queden blandos y la salsa en su punto.
Once ready, turn off and serve with your favorite accompaniments. Enjoy!

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-wine-comede.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs In Wine
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-wine-comede.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo al vino
instructions: Inicia la receta, lava muy bien los muslos y seca.
Ahora, condimenta con sal y pimienta y reserva.
Toma las cebollas y corta en julianas. Ahora, filetea muy bien los dientes de ajo.
Warm a frying pan or pan with some oil and proceed to glow your thighs till sealed. It can take you 7 minutes.
Ahora, incorpora los dientes de ajo y la cebolla y mezcla muy bien. Cocina por 2 minutos.

Finally, add the white wine with the laurel leaf, the rosemary and salt and pepper to taste. Mix some and put the fire down half. Let them cook for 7 more minutes or till they reduce their alcohol and their thighs are soft and golden.
Apaga y esparce el perejil troceado.
Sirve los muslos con tus guarniciones favoritas y disfruta.

recipe-for-delicious-glazed-donuts-comed.name: Recipe For Delicious Glazed Donuts
instructions: En un recipiente grande, disuelve la levadura con agua tibia.
It then incorporates the egg, melted butter, milk and sugar. Mix well till the ingredients are integrated.
Poco a poco agrega la harina y mezcla.

Pass the dough to a work table and amase till the flour stick into your hands. Let the mass stand at a warm place an hour or till it doubles its size into a slightly greased container and cover with plastic paper.
Presiona la masa para que salga el aire.
Pasado el tiempo, pasa la masa a la mesa de trabajo, quita el aire amasando ligeramente y extiende la masa.
A cookie cutter cuts his big circle.
Cut the small circles from the centre.
Let them rest their doves covered with a clean blanket for 30 minutes to grow a little more.
Mientras tanto, en una olla calienta suficiente aceite a fuego medio.
When the oil's at good temperature, frying the doughnuts for a few minutes at each end till they get golden. Repeat with all the doughnuts.
Let the doughnuts drain the oil into a napkin and while, merge the chocolates you will use in the doughnuts.
Baits the doughnuts with the frosted chocolates.
Pon las donas sobre una rejilla,y decora con granillos de colores.
Disfruta.

recipe-for-enchiladas-with-red-chili-com.name: Recipe For Enchiladas With Red Chili
recipe-for-enchiladas-with-red-chili-com.original_name: Receta de enchiladas con chile colorado
instructions: In a hot frying pan, slightly touch the guajillo and broad chilies till they shed their scent and make sure they do not burn them.
Remove chilies in hot water for 15 minutes or till they are soft.
In a blender, place the moist chilies, garlic, onion and chicken stock. Loan till you get a soft sauce.
Fold the salsa to remove any solid residue.
In a saucer, heat up some oil and fry the sauce for 10 minutes. Saxony with salt and comine to taste.
Heat tortillas into a frying pan or comal to make them more flexible.
He's passing every omelette through his pink chili sauce, making sure they're well covered.
Rellena las tortillas con el pollo desmenuzado y un poco de cebolla picada.
Wrap up tortillas and put them in a serving plate.
Baits enchiladas with more chili and pink sauce.
Espolvorea el queso fresco desmenuzado por encima.
Sirve caliente y disfruta.

recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-in-be.name: Recipe For Grilled Chicken Breasts In Beer
recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-in-be.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pollo a la plancha a la cerveza

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo medianas ( sin piel y sin hueso)
1 cup of blonde or amber beer (best if it's handmade)
1 cda de mostaza antigua o dijon
1 cdita de salsa de soja baja en sodio
1/2 cdita de romero seco o fresco picado
1 cda  de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)

instructions: Limpia bien las pechugas retirando cualquier exceso de grasa. Puedes hacer unos cortes superficiales para que la marinada penetre mejor.

In a big bowl, mix beer, garlic, mustard, honey, soya sauce, rosemary, salt and pepper. Add your breasts and make sure they are well covered. Cover and leave marines in the refrigerator for 1 to 4 hours.
Warm a frying pan or non-stick plate with medium-high heat and add olive oil. Drain the breasts slightly before put them into the frying pan.

Cooking the breasts 5 to 6 minutes per side (depending on thickness), till they are golden from the outside and completely cooked from inside. If you wish, you can add some of the marinade at the end of the cooking to caramelish and shine.
Retire from the fire, let them rest for a few minutes and, if you like, end with a touch of lemon fringes to highlight the flavors.
Serves hot, with your favorite garrison.

recipe-for-piloncillo-pigs-comedera.name: Recipe For Piloncillo Pigs
instructions: Mix into a bowl 25 ml of tibia water, leaven, ¼ teaspoon sugar and ¼ teaspoon wheat flour. It integrates very well and lets rest for 15 minutes.
In a pot put the 100 ml of water and pyloncillo, mix and cook with medium heat while still moving. You have to mix well and cook till you get an syrup-type consistency with no clumps.
Add to the pot the cloves of smell, cinnamon powder and anise powder. Mixing and saving.
Deja reposar y luego retiras los clavos.
On your kitchen counter, add flour, sodium bicarbonate and baking powder. Revolves well to distribute and then forms a volcano.
Add the vegetable oil, an egg and the activated yeast that you did at the first step of this recipe
Incorporates the tipple and blend till you get a consistent and uniform mass. That's about 10 minutes.
If you notice your dough's dry, add some water and mix. Make your dough a ball. Cover with film paper and let rest for 30 minutes in the refrigerator.
Meanwhile purify the oven at 180 ″ 3 ″.
Extiende tu masa en la encimera de tu cocina previamente enharinada y aplana con un rodillo.
Con un cortador en forma de puerquito, corta toda la masa.
Pass the dandrugs to a charola with baking paper and varnish with egg. Hornea for 3 minutes at 180.
Saca del horno, deja enfriar y degusta.

recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-ham-and.name: Recipe For Zucchini Stuffed With Ham And Cheese
recipe-for-zucchini-stuffed-with-ham-and.original_name: Receta de calabacines rellenos de jamón y queso
instructions: Lava muy bien los calabacines con abundante agua para retirar cualquier impureza.
Corta los calabacines a lo largo por la mitad. Que te queden como unas canoas.
Haz unos cortes dentro de las calabacines. Con la ayuda de una cuchara retira la pulpa y filetea muy bien.
Trocea la pulpa y reserva las canoas de calabacines.
Peel the onion into very small pieces.
Cut ham into cubes or cuts and scrape mozzarella cheese.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil and sock the onion. Incorporates ham and pits for 3 minutes.
Add the pumpkin pulp, salt and pepper to suit. Mix and cook for another 2 minutes. Turn and put them out.
Rellena los calabacines con el salteado y agrega por encima el queso mozzarella, luego el parmesano.
It puts on a plate and purge for about 20 minutes at 180 ° or till they are rewarded.
Enjoy with a salad or alone. They're super rich.

recipe-to-make-argentine-provoleta-step-.name: Recipe To Make Argentine Provoleta, Step By Step
recipe-to-make-argentine-provoleta-step-.original_name: Receta para hacer provoleta argentina, paso a paso
instructions: Corta los tomates cherrys por la mitad.
Fold with a garlic tooth the mud pan and then add half of the cherrys tomatoes previously minced. Lazona with a pint of salt and pepper.
Coloca la provoleta y encima del queso, vierte la otra mitad de los tomates cherrys y albahaca fresca picada.
Hornea at 360 ″ 3 ″ for 20-25 minutes.
Retract from the oven and enjoy with bread.

recipe-to-make-turkey-lasagna-comedera.name: Recipe To Make Turkey Lasagna
recipe-to-make-turkey-lasagna-comedera.original_name: Receta fácil para hacer lasaña de pavo
instructions: In a frying pan melt the butter, then place the flour and remove well.
Agrega la leche caliente tratando de que no se formen grumos.
Dig and add parmesan and nutmeg.
If the preparations are too thick, add more milk. Reserve.
En una olla con aceite caliente dora las cebollas.
Luego pon la salsa de tomate, la carne de pavo deshilachada, la sal, la pimienta y el tomillo.
Cocina durante 25 minutos y reserva.
Engrasa con mantequilla una fuente refractaria.
It goes through hot water and puts them at the fountain and adds half the turkey.
Pon otra capa de pasta y cubre con la mitad de salsa blanca y mozzarella rallada.
Add another cape of pasta and add the rest of turkey and white sauce.
Repite el procedimiento hasta que se acaben todos los ingredientes.
Cubre con el resto de queso mozzarella.
Hornea durante 30 minutos.

red-velvet-truffles-argiro.name: Red Velvet Truffles
instructions: In a bowl, crush the cake and keep 1 tablespoon of crumbs for the garnish.
Add the icing sugar, rum and cream cheese to the crushed cake.
First mix with a spoon to combine the ingredients and then knead the mixture with the fingers.
We take spoonfuls of the mixture and make 10 balls of 30 grams.
Finely chop the white chocolate and melt it in ben meri.
Add the sunflower oil and mix to homogenize.
Dip the truffles into the white chocolate mixture in doses.
Using two forks we roll them over completely and then take them out on non-stick paper.
Sprinkle the red velvet truffles with the red crumbs we kept while the coating is still wet to stick to the surface.
When stabilized, keep them in the refrigerator.

reeses-stuffed-brownies.name: Reese's Stuffed Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°. Butter the inside of 9”-×-13” inch baking pan and line with parchment paper.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and cocoa powder.

Set a large heatproof bowl over a saucepan of simmering water to create a double-boiler. Add the butter and the chocolate chips to the bowl. Heat, stirring occasionally until the chocolate and butter are completely melted and smooth. Turn off the heat, then whisk in the sugars and stir until combined. Remove bowl from heat.

Add the eggs one at a time, stirring well between each addition. Stir in vanilla. Sprinkle the flour mixture over the chocolate mixture and fold in the dry ingredients with a rubber spatula until just combined.

Pour the batter into parchment paper-lined baking pan then press the whole peanut butter cups into the batter. Bake until a toothpick inserted into the center of the brownies comes out with a few moist crumbs, about 30 minutes.
Let cool completely in the pan. Cut into squares and serve at room temperature.

reuben-sandwich-the-american-that-you-ha.name: Reuben Sandwich, The American That You Have To Try
reuben-sandwich-the-american-that-you-ha.original_name: Sándwich Reuben, el clásico americano que tienes que probar

ingredients.item: 4-6 rebanadas de carne de pastrami o corned beef
1/4 de taza de chucrut, bien escurrido
2 rebanadas de queso suizo (como emmental o gruyere)
1-2 cucharadas de aderezo ruso o russian dressing
1-2 cucharadas de mantequilla (para untar en el pan)
1 cucharada de pepinillos dulces picados finamente (o relish de pepinillos dulces)
1 / 2 tablespoon hot radish (optional, for a hot touch)

instructions: In a medium bowl, it combines mayonnaise, ketchup, Dijon mustard, sweet pickles, onion (if you are using them), hot radish, and Worcestershire sauce. Test the sauce and adjust the taste with salt and pepper to suit. If you prefer a more sweet taste, you can add some more pickles or ketchup. If you like more hot, add some more hot radish. Let the salsa rest in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before using it so that flavors are well integrated.
Toma dos rebanadas de pan de centeno y unta una capa delgada de mantequilla en uno de los lados de cada rebanada.
He puts a slice of bread with the butter-free part down into a frying pan with medium heat.
Add a slice of Swiss cheese, followed by a generous portion of pastrami or corned beef.
Encima, coloca el chucrut bien escurrido y luego una cucharada de salsa rusa.
Finally, add another slice of Swiss cheese and close the sandwich with the second slice of bread with the part with butter up.

It cooks the sandwich with medium heat, slightly pressurized with a scatula so that all ingredients merge. Cooking for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or till the bread is golden and crispy and the cheese has been melted. Remove the Sandwich from the frying pan, cut them in half and serve them hot. Join with pickle or light salad.

rhubarb-crumble.name: Rhubarb Crumble
instructions: Combine rhubarb, white sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, egg, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon together in a large bowl until evenly coated.
Spread rhubarb mixture into the prepared baking dish.

Mix 1 ½ cups flour, brown sugar, oats, and 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon together in a separate bowl. Cut in butter using a pastry cutter or two forks until topping is crumbly. Sprinkle topping over rhubarb layer.
Bake in the preheated oven until hot and bubbling, about 40 minutes.
Serve hot or cold.

rhubarb-upside-down-cake.name: Rhubarb Upside-down Cake
instructions: Spread rhubarb in an even layer in the prepared pan. Sprinkle with sugar, then gelatin powder; spread miniature marshmallows in an even layer.
Prepare batter according to cake mix package instructions. Spread batter on top of marshmallows.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 40 to 50 minutes. Allow to cool.

rich-yogurt-smoothie-argiro.name: Rich Yogurt Smoothie
instructions: You can wash the fruits of your liking earlier and put them in the freezer to freeze (e.g. strawberries and peaches are a perfect combination).
Freeze for 2 hours unless you use frozen fruit in the first place.
Beat yoghurt with milk until it hangs (a few seconds).
Add the frozen fruit and hit the blender again for a few seconds.
Add 2 glasses and serve immediately.

ricotta-cheesecake-with-almond-praline.name: Ricotta Cheesecake With Almond Praline
instructions: Preheat oven to 150°C (149°C).
Lightly grease a 22cm round springform cake tin and line the base with non-stick baking paper. Set aside.
To make the base, place the flour, sugar and butter in a food processor and process for 1 minute or until a rough dough forms.
Using the back of a spoon, press the mixture into the base of the prepared tin. Bake for 30–35 minutes or until golden and just cooked. Set aside to cool slightly.

While the base is baking, make the filling. Place the cream cheese, ricotta, sugar, lemon juice, lemon rind and vanilla in a food processor and process until smooth. Place the cornstarch and water in a small bowl and mix until smooth. Add the cornstarch mixture and the eggs to the filling and process to combine.
Lightly re-grease the sides of the cake tin and pour the filling over the base, tapping gently to remove any air bubbles.
Bake for 50 minutes–1 hour or until light golden and just set. Allow to cool in the closed oven for 50 minutes.
Refrigerate for 1 hour or until chilled.

Preheat oven to 200°C (204°C). Sprinkle the sugar over a large lightly greased baking tray lined with non-stick baking paper. Bake for 12–15 minutes or until melted. Sprinkle with the almonds and allow to set completely on the tray. Crush the praline into small pieces. Sprinkle the cheesecake with the almond praline to serve, pressing gently to secure.

ricotta-scrambled-eggs-and-buttered-ramp.name: Ricotta Scrambled Eggs And Buttered Ramps On Toast

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Cut ramps, including greens, crosswise into 1" pieces; set greens aside. Heat 3 Tbsp. butter in a medium skillet, preferably nonstick, and cook bulbs and stalks, stirring often, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add greens and cook, stirring, until tender, about 2 minutes; season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a plate.

Heat remaining 3 Tbsp. butter in skillet. Lightly beat eggs, add to pan, and cook, stirring often, until just set. Mix in ricotta; season with salt and crushed red pepper flakes. Divide scrambled eggs among toast; top with ramps.

rigatoni-with-sausage-beans-and-greens.name: Rigatoni With Sausage, Beans, And Greens
instructions:
The first thing you want to do is get your pasta water boiling. Fill a large pot (preferably around 8 quarts) with approximately 6 quarts water, then put it over high heat. When you see wisps of steam, add 3 Tbsp. salt, stir once, and cover the pot. This will make it boil faster. Yes, it’s A LOT of salt, but as the pasta cooks, it absorbs the salty water, ensuring the pasta is seasoned from the inside out. You end up dumping most of the salt anyway when you drain the water.
→  How to know which pasta shapes to use when

While the water comes to a boil, prep your other ingredients. Remove 3 links sausage from its casings and set aside. Dump 1 can beans into a strainer or colander and rinse well. Shake off excess water. Turn out beans onto a couple of sheets of paper towel and pat dry with a few more paper towels. Strip kale leaves off the thick woody ribs and tear into small pieces; discard ribs. Finely grate 2 oz. Parmesan using the small holes of a box grater. Set aside about ½ cup cheese for garnishing.

Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or large skillet, preferably with straight sides, over medium-high. It’s best to use a vessel with high sides, because you’re about to do a lot of tossing and flinging when the pasta goes in, and this will minimize spillage. Add sausage and cook, breaking up with a wooden spoon and stirring occasionally, until meat is browned, crispy in places, and cooked through, 8–10 minutes. Transfer with a spider or slotted spoon to a plate. Remove pot from heat and set aside.
Pour 12 oz. pasta into water and stir once. Set timer for 3 minutes less than the package advises. You’re going to cook it well shy of al dente.

While pasta is cooking, return pot to medium-low heat and add beans and ½ tsp. red pepper flakes. Cook, tossing occasionally and mashing some beans with spoon, until browned in spots, about 5 minutes. Transfer about half of beans to plate with sausage.
Using a ladle or liquid measuring cup, add about 1 cup cooking liquid from pasta into pot with beans (reserve remaining liquid). Increase heat to medium-high.

Using spider or a slotted spoon, transfer pasta to pot with beans and add kale. Toss vigorously with tongs to move the pasta around to incorporate the kale as it wilts.
→  The 5 easy steps to glossy, silky, restaurant-y pasta are right here!

Continue to cook, tossing often, until kale is wilted, pasta is al dente, and water is reduced by about half, about 4 minutes. If water is reduced before pasta is al dente, add another ¼–½ cup pasta cooking liquid. Reduce heat to low.
Add another ¼ cup pasta cooking liquid, then gradually add cheese, tossing all the while, until cheese is emulsified into the water and forms a luxurious, glossy sauce.
Remove pot from heat and add reserved beans and sausage, then 2 Tbsp. butter, tossing, until butter is melted.
Taste pasta and add more salt if needed. Cut 1 lemon in half and squeeze one half over pasta, then drizzle with remaining 1 Tbsp. oil.
Divide pasta among bowls and top with reserved ½ cup cheese.

roast-chicken-with-rosemary-lemon-and-ho.name: Roast Chicken With Rosemary, Lemon, And Honey

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Line a large roasting pan with 3/4 of rosemary sprigs. Place chickens on top.

Whisk 1/2 cup oil, lemon juice, and honey in a small bowl to blend. Using your hands and beginning at the neck end of chicken, gently lift skin away from breast. Under skin of each chicken, rub 1/4 cup lemon mixture into meat. Drizzle remaining lemon mixture all over outside of chickens.

Place 1 lemon half and 1 shallot inside each chicken cavity; stuff with remaining rosemary sprigs, dividing equally. Season chickens all over with salt and pepper. Place remaining shallots around chickens; arrange 4 lemon rounds on top of each chicken. Drizzle shallots and lemon rounds with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil.

Roast chickens, basting frequently with pan juices, for 45 minutes. Increase oven temperature to 425° and continue roasting until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh registers 165° and skin is deep golden and crispy, about 10 minutes longer.
Spoon pan juices over chickens, shallots, and lemon slices and serve in roasting pan.

roast-duck-breasts-with-pomegranate-chil.name: Roast Duck Breasts With Pomegranate-chile Sauce

ingredients.item: Adobo sauce from canned chipotle chiles in adobo**

ingredients.prep: skin and fat trimmed to size of breast

instructions: Stir sugar and 1/2 cup water in heavy large saucepan over medium heat until sugar dissolves. Increase heat; boil until syrup is deep amber color, swirling pan occasionally, about 8 minutes. Add juice, broth, and California chiles. Boil until sauce is reduced to 1 1/2 cups, about 25 minutes. Remove from heat; cool. Puree in tightly covered blender until smooth, about 2 minutes. Transfer to bowl. Whisk in adobo sauce, vinegar, and cumin. Season to taste with generous amount of coarse salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 week ahead. Cover and chill. Rewarm over low heat before using.

Preheat oven to 204°C. Score skin of duck (don't cut into flesh) with 5 cuts in 1 direction; repeat in opposite direction, making diamond pattern. Sprinkle duck all over with coarse salt, pepper, and ground coriander. Place 2 large ovenproof skillets over medium-high heat. Add duck, skin side down, to skillets, dividing equally. Cook duck until skin is crisp and deep brown, about 7 minutes. Turn duck over; cook 1 minute. Pour off fat. Transfer skillets to oven. Roast duck until cooked to medium-rare, about 5 minutes.
Transfer duck to cutting board. Let rest 5 minutes. Thinly slice each breast crosswise on slight diagonal. Arrange slices on plates. Spoon sauce over. Sprinkle with pomegranate seeds.

roast-trout-with-lentils-and-verjus.name: Roast Trout With Lentils And Verjus

ingredients.item: Black beluga lentils or french green lentils
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
-oz. skin-on steelhead trout or salmon fillets
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Verjus is a tart juice made from unripe grapes. Find it at specialty foods stores and online.

Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add carrot, celery, onion, and garlic and cook, stirring often, until softened, 5–8 minutes. Mix in lentils and add broth to cover by 1”. Bring to a boil; reduce heat, cover, and simmer, adding more broth as needed to keep lentils covered, until lentils are tender, 20–30 minutes. Mix in vinegar; season with salt and pepper. Cover and set aside; keep warm.
DO AHEAD: Lentils can be cooked 1 day ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

Bring shallot, garlic, star anise, bay leaf, peppercorns, verjus, and wine to a boil in a medium saucepan and cook until reduced to ¼ cup, 15–20 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small saucepan; discard solids.

Place saucepan over low heat and gradually whisk in butter, until butter is melted and sauce is emulsified. Whisk in tarragon and lemon juice; season with salt and pepper. Cover and set aside; keep warm.

Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Season fish with salt and pepper. Place fish, skin side down, in pan and cook, undisturbed, until skin is crisp and releases from pan, about 4 minutes. Turn fish, add butter to pan, and cook, tilting pan and spooning butter over fish, until opaque throughout, about 2 minutes longer.
Stir parsley into verjus beurre blanc just before serving. Serve fish with lentils and sauce.

roasted-beet-salad.name: Roasted Beet Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Wrap beets loosely in aluminum foil and place on a rimmed baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven until easily pierced with a knife or skewer, 50 to 60 minutes. Unwrap and cool until easily handled, about 10 minutes. Peel beets and cut into chunks.
Mix vinegar and maple syrup together; season with salt and pepper. Pour over beets. Refrigerate until beets absorb the flavors, at least 1 hour. Serve cold.

roasted-brussels-sprouts-with-balsamic-a.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts With Balsamic And Honey
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine Brussels sprouts, olive oil, salt and pepper in a large bowl; toss to coat. Spread out evenly on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven until browned, about 30 minutes, turning after 15 minutes. Remove from oven and drizzle with balsamic vinegar and honey, mixing to coat evenly.

roasted-carrot-parsnip-and-potato-coins.name: Roasted Carrot, Parsnip, And Potato Coins

ingredients.item: Fingerling potatoes or baby dutch yellow potatoes

instructions: Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven and preheat to 191°C. Spray 2 heavy large rimmed baking sheets with nonstick spray. Cut carrots and parsnips into 3- to 4-inch lengths. Fit processor with 1/4-inch-thick slicing disk. Working in batches, place carrot pieces upright and fitting snugly side by side in feed tube of processor. With machine running, use plunger to push down firmly on carrots and cut uniform round slices. Transfer carrot coins to extra-large bowl. Repeat with parsnips, then potatoes.

Add olive oil, 2 teaspoons coarse salt, coriander, cardamom, and freshly ground black pepper to vegetable mixture and toss to coat. Divide mixture between prepared baking sheets. Roast vegetables until tender and golden brown around edges, about 1 hour. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm in 177°C oven until heated through, about 15 minutes.
Transfer roasted vegetable coins to large bowl and serve.

roasted-cod-with-sauteed-cabbage-telecul.name: Roasted Cod With Sautéed Cabbage
roasted-cod-with-sauteed-cabbage-telecul.original_name: Bacalhau assado com couves a soco
instructions: Get the cabbage, punching the stalks and the hard part, and boil it in boiling water until it's soft. Remove from the fire and reserve.
Cut the bread into pieces, put them in a bowl, water with the broth to cook the cabbage and let it soak well.

Peel 2 cloves of garlic, pick them up and saute them in 4 tablespoons of oil until they are golden. Add the bread slush, the boiled kale, cut into small pieces, and a little chopped cilantro. Retrieve the seasonings of salt and pepper and stir well, until it becomes a kind of açorda. Then remove from the fire and dispose in a clay or refractory container.

Season the cod posts with a hint of pepper and the other chopped garlic. Praise them on both sides in a frying pan with the rest of the oil. Have the cod on the cabbage and put it in the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 12 minutes.

roasted-eggplant-chutney-argiro.name: Roasted Eggplant Chutney

ingredients.item: 2 large eggplant flasks cut into small frames
2 large eggplant flasks cut into small frames

instructions: Preheat the oven to 200oC.
Add the eggplants to a baking pan.
Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar and add salt and pepper.
Bake the eggplants for the chutney for about half an hour. Sometimes we mix them while they are baked.
When they're cooked, we mash them with a fork or a blender.
Heat the olive oil in a pot and sauce the onion for 3′-4′′.
Add the garlic for 1, and then add the peppers and parsley and let them soften.
Add the oregano, basil, coriander and cut tomatoes.
Cook for 25′ to thinken the chutney.
Add the eggplant purée and simmer 20′ extra.
Allow it to cool slightly.
Add the pepper sauce, balsamic cream and ketchup.
Mix well.
Serve with toasted bread and vinegar.

roasted-fingerling-potatoes-with-chive-p.name: Roasted Fingerling Potatoes With Chive Pesto

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. In a medium bowl, toss potatoes with 1 Tbsp. oil to coat; season generously with salt and pepper. Spread potato halves in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast potatoes, turning occasionally, until tender and golden brown, 25-30 minutes.

Meanwhile, combine ½ cup chives, parsley, almonds, and garlic in a processor. Pulse until finely chopped. With machine running, gradually add remaining oil through feed tube and process until incorporated. Transfer chive pesto to a small bowl. Stir in lemon juice, then 2 Tbsp. water. Season pesto with salt and pepper.
Transfer potatoes to a platter. Drizzle with half of pesto; sprinkle with additional chopped chives. Serve with remaining pesto.

roasted-parsnip-soup-with-walnut-pesto.name: Roasted Parsnip Soup With Walnut Pesto

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss parsnips with 1 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl and season with salt and pepper. Arrange parsnips in a single layer on a rimmed baking sheet and roast until tender and lightly caramelized, 22–25 minutes.

Meanwhile, pulse walnuts and herbs in a mini-processor until very finely chopped. (Alternatively, crush walnuts and herbs with a mortar and pestle to form a coarse paste.) Add remaining 2 Tbsp. oil and lemon juice and pulse to combine. Season pesto to taste with salt and pepper. Set aside.

Let parsnips cool slightly, then transfer to a blender. Add stock; purée until smooth. Pour soup into a large saucepan and heat over medium heat until warmed through. Season with salt and pepper and divide among bowls. Drizzle with pesto and serve.

roasted-pepper-hummus-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Pepper Hummus Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 red mole pepper (közed or moled in the oven)
Instead of the canned chickpeas, you can use dry chickpeu with more fresh and natural taste.
Faster solution for ready-molmade nozzles can be used.
Using yellow or orange pepper instead of red pepper, you can create differentity of color and taste.
You can alternatively add roasted sac “köz pound humus  ”
You can prepare a lighter humus by adding yogurt or lab instead.
Peanut paste or almond paste can also add a different aroma; but the taste varies slightly.
You can use avocado oil or nuts oil instead of olive oil; humusa gives light dried aroma.
Besides salt and pepper, you can also enrich the aroma by adding kimyon, red flakes, paprika or sume.
Birka&ccedil deepens the taste of humus, adding drip balmic vinegar or lemon juice.
Villageou can get a taste by changing the amount of garlic to pepper and chickpe mixture.

instructions: 1. Kö peel off the pepper shells and bring them toine.
2. Take nohut, tahin, garlic, lemon juice and olive oil into the kitchen robot.
3. Kö add peppers and swabs up to island areas.
4. Add salt, pepper and optional spices and mix again.
5. Take the Humusu serving plate, visit a little olive oil on the car and s&uuml with pepper or fresh mint.
6.  Afiyet olsun.

roquefort-sauce-blue-cheese-dip-argiro.name: Roquefort Sauce (blue Cheese Dip)
instructions: Mix all the ingredients for the rockfort sauce in a bowl.
Cut the vegetables into sticks.
Place them on a platter all around and place the vegetables and baked potatoes in the middle.
Fill the baked potatoes with the rockfort sauce.
Easy and fantastic dipaki ideal for fingerfood, but also perfect sauce for burgers.
You want more easy recipes with blue cheese? Find them all here!

rotolo.name: Rotolo
instructions: Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to a 20x12" rectangle, about ⅛" thick, orienting dough so that a long edge is facing you (short edges will be to your left and right). Cover dough with mortadella (overlapping the slices slightly is okay), leaving a ¼" border of dough around edges. Evenly dollop ricotta over mortadella; season with salt and pepper. Roll dough away from you, using a dough scraper if needed to peel it up and off the surface, into a tight log. Cut crosswise into 2 ½" rounds. Transfer rotolos to a parchment-lined large rimmed baking sheet, placing cut side up. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and let sit in a warm place until puffed slightly, 1–1 ½ hours.

Meanwhile, place a rack in upper third of oven and preheat to 425°. Toast pistachios on a small rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until fragrant and just beginning to brown, about 4 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.
Bake rotolo, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until deeply browned and dough is no longer raw in the center, 24–28 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine garlic, oil, and pistachios in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Spoon pistachio-garlic oil over warm rotolos just before serving.

royal-icing-to-decorate-desserts-comeder.name: Royal Icing To Decorate Desserts
instructions: Put the powder for meringue and water into a big bowl. Use your beaker (manual or electrical) to incorporate the ingredients for 3 minutes.
Add the sugar and beat them till the mixture gets a firm consistency. The actual frying should be as peaks in the beaker's balloon and should not be leaked.
If you wish to add color to the frying, add little by little the gel and beat up with a color consistent with the whole mixture.
Puedes agregar un poco de agua, un par de gotas a la vez, para alcanzar la consistencia que deseas.
Sirve en una duya y decora.

russian-layered-cake.name: Russian Layered Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour three 9-inch round cake pans.
Beat sugar and eggs together in a bowl using an electric mixer for 5 minutes.
Sift flour and baking soda together in another bowl. Beat into the egg and sugar mixture gradually, alternating with sour cream, until a smooth batter forms. Divide batter equally between 3 bowls.
Fold walnuts into the first bowl, raisins into the second bowl, and poppy seeds to the third. Pour each bowl into its own separate cake pan.
Bake cakes in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the centers comes out clean, 20 to 30 minutes.
Let cakes cool in pans for a few minutes. Remove from pans carefully; let cool completely, at least 30 minutes.

Beat 3/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons butter in a bowl using an electric mixer until creamy. Add condensed milk slowly, mixing with a fork or spatula in a clockwise motion. Spread a couple of tablespoons of buttercream onto a large cake plate.

Place one of the cakes onto the butter cream on the cake plate. Spread another few tablespoons buttercream over the cake and lay another cake on top. Repeat with the remaining cake and cover top and sides with remaining buttercream. Decorate as desired.

rustic-flatbread-pizza.name: Rustic Flatbread Pizza
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, and stir in mushrooms and garlic; sprinkle with salt and black pepper. Cook and stir until mushrooms have given off their juice and juice has evaporated, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat and set mushroom mixture aside.

Heat 1 more tablespoon olive oil in a separate large skillet over medium-high heat until very hot, and place asparagus into the skillet. Cook, stirring occasionally, until asparagus pieces are very well browned (almost but not quite burned in spots), about 8 minutes. Remove asparagus from skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium, and cook bacon in the same skillet until crisp, about 10 minutes; stir often. Drain excess grease as bacon cooks, for crispier pieces.
Remove bacon pieces and place on a paper towel-lined plate; blot with paper towels to reduce grease.
Place flatbread crust onto the prepared baking sheet, and spread marinara sauce over crust.
Spread mushrooms and garlic evenly over pizza.
Spread asparagus over pizza.
Arrange bacon pieces on pizza.
Sprinkle mozzarella cheese all over pizza, followed by Asiago cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheeses are melted and bubbling, 12 to 15 minutes.
